personal_info.title: Full Stack Engineer & AI Integration Specialist

career_narrative.elevator_pitch: Yogita Mittal is a results-driven Full Stack Engineer with 13+ years of experience in architecting and deploying scalable web platforms and AI-integrated solutions for global brands. She excels in end-to-end product ownership, from design and infrastructure automation to front-end UX and back-end performance, leveraging Python, JavaScript, React, Next.js, and SQL. With a proven track record in e-commerce, SaaS, and MarTech domains, she consistently improves speed, reliability, conversion, and user engagement, while actively expanding expertise in Machine Learning and AI systems.
career_narrative.tone_guidelines: Professional, results-driven, technical, emphasizes ownership, measurable impact, and a blend of deep full-stack expertise with emerging AI/ML capabilities. Acknowledges maiden name 'Singla' for official documents.

experiences.title: Marketing Engineering Owner / Wordpress Developer
bullet_points: Sole Technical Owner for the global marketing ecosystem, managing WordPress, HubSpot, and CRM integrations.
Engineered high-performance landing pages and custom GTM/Clearbit data-enrichment flows for lead generation.
Architected a custom SEO and pagination system that improved site health from 78% to 98%.
Strategic decision-maker for the marketing stack, including tool procurement, plugin security, and API scaling.

Optimized and scaled a high-traffic website by reducing load speed from 3.5s to 0.7s, leveraging caching, CDN (CloudFront), and efficient asset management, ensuring seamless user experience during peak traffic.
Optimized website content, FAQ Schemas, images and videos using tools like S3 bucket, CloudFront, CDN services.
Developed reusable and scalable React components, reducing redundant code and improving frontend performance.
Integrated Clearbit using HubSpot in various forms, increasing form submissions by 20%.
Implemented scalable infrastructure by containerizing WordPress with CI/CD pipelines and Docker, reducing deployment time and improving maintainability for a growing user base.
Collaborated with design and content teams to enhance visual consistency and lead conversion.
Built and updated the Events, FAQs, and Resources sections with paginated structures.
